Argument.Name: certPath
Argument.Description: Directory that contains existing binary certificate files (.der, .crt, .pem).

Argument.Name: outputjwks
Argument.Description: Output path and filename of the JWKS output.

Option.Description: Output JWK to the console and don't write a file.
The hash output type for the fingerprint/thumbprint
Overwrite the output file if it exists.

Argument.Name: certificate
Argument.Description: Full path location and name of the certificate file to build JWK for.

Argument.Name: outputFile
Argument.Description: Full path location and name of the jwk file that will be created.

Option.Description: Output JWK to the console and don't write a file.
The hash output type for the fingerprint/thumbprint
Overwrite the output file if it exists.

Argument.Name: certPath
Argument.Description: Directory that contains existing binary certificate files (.der, .crt, .pem).

Argument.Name: jwksFile
Argument.Description: Path and filename of the JWKS file to verify.

Option.Description: Option to create a new file with updated values
The hash output type for the fingerprint/thumbprint
